title: eschscholzia californica var. mexicana
intro: Eschscholzia californica var. mexicana, commonly known as Mexican Gold Poppy, is a variety of the California poppy plant that is native to the southwestern United States and northern Mexico. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its anti-inflammatory and antispasmodic properties, which can help to soothe and calm the body. The medicinal properties of the Mexican Gold Poppy include its ability to reduce pain and inflammation, making it a potential natural remedy for conditions such as arthritis and menstrual cramps. Mexican Gold Poppy can be prepared as a tea, tincture, or salve, and it is also used in herbal preparations to support the health benefits of reducing anxiety and promoting relaxation.
